description: Identify and fix disconnected transfer transactions in the 'disconnected_transfers.xml' portfolio. Replace the separate 'Removal' and 'Deposit' entries representing transfers from 'Main Checking' to 'Brokerage Cash' ($2,500.00 on May 15, 2024, and $1,200.00 on May 28, 2024) with proper linked 'Transfer' transactions. Save the updated portfolio to 'disconnected_transfers.xml'.
